# logomaker/data

Input and output files for the NC Wikipedians logo pipeline.

---

## Source files

### `wikimedia-us-nc-logo/Flag-map_of_North_Carolina.svg`

**Source:** Downloaded from Wikimedia Commons
**URL:** https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?title=File:Flag-map_of_North_Carolina.svg&oldid=1113745613
**License:** Public domain (flag design) / CC BY-SA (map outline)

The NC state outline with the North Carolina state flag embedded inside it. Used as the input to `generate-nc-outline.py`.

---

## Generated files

### `nc-outline.svg`

Generated by `generate-nc-outline.py` with default settings:

```bash
uv run generate-nc-outline.py
# --fill #ffffff  (white interior)
# --stroke #000000  (black outline)
```

The NC state silhouette with the flag removed. White fill, black stroke. Used as the input to `add-text-to-logo.py`.

---

### `nc-logo.svg`

Generated by `add-text-to-logo.py` with default settings:

```bash
uv run add-text-to-logo.py
# --layout below
# --text "NORTH CAROLINA" --text "WIKIPEDIANS"
# --font-family sans-serif  --font-weight bold
# --text-color #000000
```

NC outline with "NORTH CAROLINA" and "WIKIPEDIANS" in bold sans-serif centered below the shape.

---

### `nc-logo-clipped.svg`

Generated by `add-text-to-logo.py` with the `clipped` layout:

```bash
uv run add-text-to-logo.py --layout clipped -o data/nc-logo-clipped.svg
# --text "NORTH CAROLINA" --text "WIKIPEDIANS"
# --font-family sans-serif  --font-weight bold
# --font-size 18180 (auto-calculated: 45% of shape height)
```

Text clipped to the NC silhouette — letters are only visible inside the state outline.

---

### `nc-logo-overlay.svg`

Generated by `add-text-to-logo.py` with the `overlay` layout:

```bash
uv run add-text-to-logo.py --layout overlay --shape-opacity 0.3 -o data/nc-logo-overlay.svg
# --text "NORTH CAROLINA" --text "WIKIPEDIANS"
# --font-family sans-serif  --font-weight bold
# --shape-opacity 0.3
```

Text centered on top of the NC shape, with the shape faded to 30% opacity.

---

### `last-run.log`

Log output from the most recent script run. Overwritten on each run via:

```bash
uv run <script>.py [options] 2>&1 | tee data/last-run.log
```
